_comment: Machine-readable batch tracker. Update after each session.

deploy.flow: push to master -> .github/workflows/build-and-publish.yml builds Hugo -> force-pushes site/public/ to 'live' branch -> Hostinger webhook auto-deploys live -> public_html
deploy.notes: Old .github/workflows/deploy.yml is disabled. dangerous-clean-slate FTP was unreliable; replaced entirely.

engines.1_combinatorial_generators: PARTIAL — Phase 3C planned (service x city). Pattern proven by event-security/{city}.md silo. To formalise in Turn C.
engines.2_structured_data_layer: DONE — data/city_risk_profiles*.json, security_regulations.json, fcdo_advisories.json, state_dept_data.json, keyword_matrix.json (75 clusters)
engines.3_bulk_blog_factory: IN PROGRESS — 6/19 batches (30/411 articles by pet-transport benchmark). Tracker scripts in scripts/generate_blog_batch*.py
engines.4_internal_link_graph: TODO — port pet-transport rebuild_link_graph.py + diagnose_links.py + fix_broken_links.py patterns
engines.5_qa_seo_quality_gate: TODO — port pet-transport qa_audit.py / check_schema.py / check_titles.py / fix_long_titles.py / fix_descriptions.py patterns
engines.6_incremental_deploy_pipeline: DONE — build-and-publish.yml + Hostinger OAuth webhook auto-deploy
engines.7_operating_system: DONE — CLAUDE.md (master index, updated 2026-05-28), AGENTS.md, workforce/ (14 souls), bodyguard-cascading-build-plan.html, MEMORY.md, ERRORS.md

permalink_fix: 2026-05-27 — changed from broken /:sections[1:]/:slug/ to explicit /section/:slug/ for all content types. URLs now: /cities/london/, /blog/article/, /event-security/nairobi/ etc.
baseurl_fix: 2026-05-27 — corrected from legacy https://closeprotectionhire.surge.sh/ to https://closeprotectionhire.com/
next_stage: Turn C (Phase 3C service x city) OR continue Blog Batch 7
